taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine learning, Large language models, Model training, Model fine-tuning, Model optimization
skill_match_scores: Machine learning:1.0, Large language models:1.0, Model training:1.0, Model fine-tuning:1.0, Model optimization:1.0
must_have_quals: B.S. or higher in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics or a related field, 4+ years of hands-on experience building and deploying ML models in production, Demonstrated expertise in training, finetuning, optimizing LLMs / large-scale models, Proficiency in Python and deep knowledge of leading ML frameworks and libraries, Strong passion for AI-driven innovation and a track record of delivering impactful, production-grade AI solutions, Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, collaborative environment
core_responsibilities: Research, train, and deploy SOTA ML models for enterprise use-cases, Leverage LLMs to analyze complex data and build advanced knowledge-extraction and insight-generation systems, Explore and iterate on emerging LLM techniques to advance the frontier of Context Engineering, Build and optimize agentic AI workflows that enable users to dynamically interact and refine outputs from ML systems, Develop scalable frameworks to evaluate the accuracy, robustness and usability of complex AI agents, Partner closely with product, UX, business development and strategic partners to translate AI innovations into enterprise-grade production features, Collaborate with AI Research team to constantly explore and evaluate emerging AI technologies and transform research ideas into interactive prototypes
job_summary: Adobe is a market leader in software products and services for the creative and marketing ecosystem. They are seeking a Senior Machine Learning Engineer to research, design, develop and deliver high-profile products that span GenAI features and customization of GenAI Firefly models for enterprise creators and marketers.
